name: Grilled 'Napalm' Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and de-vein the shrimp.
2. Wash, drain, and place 5-6 shrimp on each skewer.
3. In a blender, sauté onions and Habanero chiles in butter until softened.
4. Add cayenne, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, pepper, paprika, cumin seed, and brown sugar to the blended mixture.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Brush the marinade onto the shrimp skewers.
7. Marinate for 30-60 minutes in the refrigerator.
8. Preheat the grill and cook the shrimp until opaque and slightly crispy.
9. Dust with paprika before serving.
